name: forge
description: Structured build and repair workflows for coding agents
_hooksNote: hooks.json lists event names defined by Claude Code (SubagentStart, SubagentStop, PreCompact, StopFailure, Stop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, etc.). Each hook script degrades gracefully when its event is not fired by the host: if stdin is empty or absent the script exits 0 with { continue: true } and does nothing. Hosts that support only a subset of these events are safe to use.

interface.shortDescription: Continuable build and repair harness for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Gives long-running coding work persistent project structure — phase gates, ownership tracking, and continuable state across sessions.
defaultPrompt: Start a Forge harness for this project.
Show Forge status and continue the current run.
Use Forge to diagnose and fix this repo.
